channel.title: Kevin Bonavia MP
channel.description: Empowering Constituents, Inspiring Change - Together with Kevin Bonavia

item.title: MP's SEND Round-table: Shaping the Future of Support for Children and Young People
item.description: a stronger emphasis on early intervention, community-based support, and improving outcomes for children with SEND.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Bonavia

item.title: Local MP secures contactless payments for Stevenage and Knebworth stations
item.description: Railway users will be able to use contactless at Stevenage and North Hertfordshire stations in 2025, it has been confirmed. Passengers...

item.title: Stevenage MP reacts to closure of Halifax branch
item.description: MPs for Stevenage and Letchworth are "disappointed" with the decision to close Halifax branches in both towns. Lloyds Banking...
item.dc:creator: Kevin Bonavia

item.title: Kevin Bonavia MP: Priorities for coming months

item.title: Kevin Bonavia MP: Representing Stevenage and the villages

item.title: Kevin Bonavia MP: My first 100 days as the new Stevenage MP
